stemHtml: Which is the best visual ground feature to establish a checkpoint for a day VFR flight over a mountainous area for an aircraft A flying at 5 000 ft AGL and an aircraft B flying at 1 000 ft AGL?

options.a: A path for aircraft A and a small river for aircraft B.
options.b: A small lake for aircraft A and a path for aircraft B.
options.c: A large lake for aircraft A and a 200-ft-high mast for aircraft B.
options.d: A 200-ft-high mast for aircraft A and a small lake for aircraft B.
